Fixed improperly nested <BIBL> tags by inserting a missing closing </BIBL> tag after the second book entry's <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>, ensuring each bibliographic record is properly separated. 3. Corrected UTF-8 encoding artifacts (mojibake) to their intended German characters (e.g., 'Augustinergasse', 'Völcker', 'Bödickers', 'Grundsätze', '8vo.') for accurate textual representation.
